item.title: Oxford-VRM v1.10.3.25
item.description:
Product: Oxford-VRM v1.10.3.25
Company: Levylab
Release Date: Thu, 26 Feb 2026 08:49:32 -0500
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: VIs for controlling the Oxford VRM PS that controls the CF900's 3D magnet

Release Notes: - build with Remote-Control-ZMQ/1.3.6.27
item.dc:creator: Levylab

item.title: Oxford-1820 v1.6.4.24
item.description:
Product: Oxford-1820 v1.6.4.24
Company: Levylab
Release Date: Thu, 26 Feb 2026 08:49:32 -0500
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: VIs for controlling the Oxford 18/20 magnet

Release Notes: - build with Remote-Control-ZMQ/1.3.6.27
item.dc:creator: Levylab

item.title: AH2500A v1.4.4.13
item.description:
Product: AH2500A v1.4.4.13
Company: Levylab
Release Date: Thu, 26 Feb 2026 07:12:00 -0500
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: LabVIEW drivers for Andeen-Hagerling 2500A capacitance bridge

Release Notes: - build with Remote-Control-ZMQ/1.3.6.27
item.dc:creator: Levylab

item.title: Cryostation v1.4.3.12
item.description:
Product: Cryostation v1.4.3.12
Company: LevyLab
Release Date: Wed, 25 Feb 2026 23:19:01 -0500
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: Program for logging Montana Instruments Cryostation status to the SQL DB. Provides a UI and API for getting information from the Cryostation.

Release Notes: - build with Remote-Control-ZMQ/1.3.6.27
item.dc:creator: LevyLab

item.title: PPMS Monitor and Control v1.11.3.29
item.description:
Product: PPMS Monitor and Control v1.11.3.29
Company: LevyLab
Release Date: Wed, 25 Feb 2026 22:33:43 -0500
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: Monitor and Control application inheritng from Instrument Framework and SMO
- Log instrument status to the PGSQL database.
- UI and API for controlling magnet field, temperature, and rotator angle (PPMS2 only)

Release Notes: - build with Remote-Control-ZMQ/1.3.6.27
item.dc:creator: LevyLab

item.title: LEIDEN API v0.0.4.7
item.description:
Product: LEIDEN API v0.0.4.7
Company: LevyLab
Release Date: Wed, 25 Feb 2026 22:33:43 -0500
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: Tools used by LevyLab to interact with Leiden Cryostats

Front Panel (FP) API:
- pushButton({Start, 3He, 4He, Normal, Recovery, Auto, Reset, LED Test})
- setMode({Auto Off, Start, Condense 3He, Condense 4He, Normal Circulation, Recovery})
- getMode()

Temperature Control (TC) API:
- getTemperature()
- setTemperature()
- setHeater()
- getHeater()

Release Notes: - build with Remote-Control-ZMQ/1.3.6.27
item.dc:creator: LevyLab

item.title: Transport v2.3.0.41
item.description:
Product: Transport v2.3.0.41
Company: Levylab
Release Date: Wed, 25 Feb 2026 18:14:44 -0500
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: VIs for scripting and performing transport measurments.

[Control Experiment]
- Control Experiment.vi
- provides a uniform way to record information about your sample & device
- record how the lockin is connected to the device
- configure the Krohn Hite amplifier
- set the base path for saving data
- configure peripheral instruments
- APIs for recording sample data, instrument status

[Transport]
Basic transport measurments:
- Lockin vs time (Lockin_time.vi)
- Lockin Sweep Mode (Lockin_sweep.vi)

[Transport Server]
Server used for scripting and performing asynchronous transport measurments.


Release Notes: [2.3.0]
#156 updated and improved tracking of instrument configuration using SMO Attributes
#146 Improve support for Magnet Hold function in Lockin_time
item.dc:creator: Levylab

item.title: RemoteControl.ZMQ v1.3.6.27
item.description:
Product: RemoteControl.ZMQ v1.3.6.27
Company: LevyLab
Release Date: Wed, 25 Feb 2026 16:29:14 -0500
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: Override library implementing ZMQ lazy pirate reliable request reply (RRR) protocal using RemoteControl SMO framework.

Release Notes: [1.3.6]
Updates to logging:
- change `write status log.vi` to `Log Status.vi`
- logging is enable (logging = TRUE) or disabled (logging = FALSE) via `config.ini` inside same directory as log file
- logging is disabled by default
item.dc:creator: LevyLab

item.title: Multichannel Lockin v3.3.2.71
item.description:
Product: Multichannel Lockin v3.3.2.71
Company: LevyLab
Release Date: Tue, 24 Feb 2026 13:45:11 -0500
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: Multichannel Lockin for National Instruments' Dynamic Signal Acquisition hardware (4431, 4461, 4462).
- This version is configured to handle multiple cards for simultaneous, synchronized AI/AO.
- The analog outputs can be configured to output sine, square, sawtooth, or triangle functions with (swept) DC offsets.
- Each of the analog inputs can be demodulated at multiple frequencies.

Release Notes: - build with ZMQ 1.3.5
item.dc:creator: LevyLab

item.title: Krohn-Hite-7008 v2.6.1.34
item.description:
Product: Krohn-Hite-7008 v2.6.1.34
Company: LevyLab
Release Date: Tue, 24 Feb 2026 13:45:11 -0500
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: Drivers and UI for Krohn-Hite 7008 multichannel amplifiers.

Release Notes: - build with ZMQ 1.3.5
item.dc:creator: LevyLab
